scripts.test:chrome: env -u NO_COLOR pnpm build && env -u NO_COLOR playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --project=chromium tests/native-messaging.e2e.spec.ts && env -u NO_COLOR SUMMARIZE_E2E_HTTP_TRANSPORT=1 pnpm build && env -u NO_COLOR SUMMARIZE_E2E_HTTP_TRANSPORT=1 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --project=chromium
scripts.test:firefox: env -u NO_COLOR pnpm build:firefox && env -u NO_COLOR node scripts/firefox-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:firefox:force: env -u NO_COLOR ALLOW_FIREFOX_EXTENSION_TESTS=1 pnpm build:firefox && env -u NO_COLOR ALLOW_FIREFOX_EXTENSION_TESTS=1 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --project=firefox
scripts.test:firefox:lint: env -u NO_COLOR pnpm build:firefox && env -u NO_COLOR web-ext lint --source-dir .output/firefox-mv3 --self-hosted --boring
